name: E-commerce Website
techStack: Next.js 15 App Router + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui + Framer Motion + Supabase + Drizzle ORM + Zod + Stripe + Vercel-ready

phases.name: Project Setup
phases.description: Create Next.js 15 app structure. Cursor builds this from scratch.
phases.promptTemplate:
Create a Next.js 15 app from scratch in the commission workspace.

Client info:
{{clientInfo}}

Stack: Next.js 15 App Router + TypeScript strict + Tailwind + ESLint + app/ and src/ dirs.

Create: package.json with next, react, react-dom, typescript, tailwindcss, postcss, autoprefixer, eslint, eslint-config-next. Create tsconfig.json, tailwind.config.ts, postcss.config.mjs, next.config.ts. Create src/app/layout.tsx, src/app/page.tsx, src/app/globals.css, src/app/favicon.ico. No create-next-app — write the files directly.

phases.name: Dependencies & Environment
phases.description: Add Supabase, Drizzle, shadcn/ui, Stripe, Framer Motion and env config.
phases.promptTemplate:
Add dependencies and env config to the existing Next.js 15 app.

Client info:
{{clientInfo}}

Stack: Next.js 15 + Supabase + Drizzle ORM + shadcn/ui + Framer Motion + Stripe.

Update package.json: add @supabase/supabase-js, drizzle-orm, stripe, framer-motion, zod, class-variance-authority, clsx, tailwind-merge, lucide-react.
Create .env.example with: NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, DATABASE_URL, STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET, NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY.
Update tsconfig.json with paths alias @/* for src/.

phases.name: shadcn/ui & Base Layout
phases.description: Init shadcn/ui, add root layout with theme provider and nav.
phases.promptTemplate:
Add shadcn/ui and base layout to the Next.js app.

Client info:
{{clientInfo}}

Create src/app/layout.tsx with ThemeProvider, site header/nav with company name from clientInfo, links to / and /products.
Create components.json for shadcn (content: src/**/*.{ts,tsx}, style: default, baseColor: slate, cssVariables: true).
Create src/components/theme-provider.tsx using next-themes.

phases.name: Supabase Client & Drizzle Schema
phases.description: Configure Supabase client and Drizzle schema for products, orders.
phases.promptTemplate:
Add Supabase and Drizzle to the Next.js app.

Client info:
{{clientInfo}}

Create src/lib/supabase/client.ts (createBrowserClient) and src/lib/supabase/server.ts (createServerClient).
Create src/lib/db/schema.ts with Drizzle: products (id, name, slug, description, price_cents, image_url, created_at), orders (id, user_id, status, total_cents, created_at), order_items (id, order_id, product_id, quantity, price_cents).
Create drizzle.config.ts for Postgres.

phases.name: Auth Setup
phases.description: Supabase Auth with sign-in, sign-up, middleware.
phases.promptTemplate:
Add Supabase Auth.

Client info:
{{clientInfo}}

Create src/app/auth/callback/route.ts for OAuth callback.
Create src/middleware.ts to refresh Supabase session.
Create src/app/(auth)/sign-in/page.tsx with email/password form using signInWithPassword. Link to sign-up.

phases.name: Products Page & Cart
phases.description: Products list from DB, add-to-cart with client state, cart context.
phases.promptTemplate:
Add products and cart.

Client info:
{{clientInfo}}

Create src/app/products/page.tsx (Server Component, fetch products).
Create src/components/product-card.tsx (Client, Add to cart).
Create src/context/cart-context.tsx with CartProvider, addToCart, removeFromCart, localStorage persist.

phases.name: Checkout with Stripe
phases.description: Checkout page, Stripe Checkout Session, webhook.
phases.promptTemplate:
Add Stripe checkout.

Client info:
{{clientInfo}}

Create src/app/checkout/page.tsx with cart display and Create checkout button POSTing to /api/checkout.
Create src/app/api/checkout/route.ts — Stripe Checkout Session, return { url }.
Create src/app/api/webhooks/stripe/route.ts — verify signature, handle checkout.session.completed, create order in Drizzle.

phases.name: Polish & Vercel Config
phases.description: Home page hero, footer, vercel.json, env docs.
phases.promptTemplate:
Final polish and deploy config.

Client info:
{{clientInfo}}

Update src/app/page.tsx — hero with company name, CTA to /products, Framer Motion entrance, footer.
Create vercel.json if needed.
Update README.md with Deploy to Vercel, env vars list.
